reasoning: Emotional axis strong (≈8.5/10): the mace reads as bright, warm, and toy-diorama-friendly — saturated sky-blue shaft with an orange/gold gem-crown head nails the Hyrule mood; silhouette is round and decorative, never grim. Technical axis weaker (≈6/10): 1-px hard outlines are present and pixel-grid is clean at all zoom levels, but the blue handle uses only ~2 flat tones with minimal highlight/shadow separation, falling short of the expected 2–3-tone hard shading budget for a weapon of this size; the Denzi reference weapons show crisper tonal steps even on narrow shafts. Weighted score: 0.6×8.5 + 0.4×6.0 = 7.5 → 7. Passes emotional brief comfortably; needs one more shading pass on the handle to reach full pass.
